title: The Christmas Workshop 75270 200 Warm White Christmas Tree Lights/Static Decorative LED Fairy Lights / 22.9m Length/Indoor & Outdoor Christmas Decorations
features: CHRISTMAS TREE LIGHTS - This traditional set of 200 warm white ultra-bright fairy lights are the perfect size and style to illuminate your Christmas tree this festive season!

ENERGY EFFICIENT - The Christmas fairy lights won't cost a fortune to run, and utilise LED lighting technology to further save energy. This allows the lights to be used for a full 6 hours every night at almost no cost.

WARM WHITE GLOW – These vibrant Christmas lights deliver a homely bright glow to your Christmas tree. The lights measure 22.9 metres in length, and have a 3 metre lead from the plug socket to the first bulb.

MULTI-PURPOSE DECORATIONS – Not only are these lights suitable for trees, but they can also be used to hang around any other area of your home you wish to illuminate this festive season. Alternately these lights are fantastic to use at weddings, birthday parties and any other celebrations too.

CHRISTMAS WORKSHOP – The Christmas Workshop is the leading supplier of all things Christmas related. From Christmas trees & festive ornaments, to fairy lights and projector lights, you can find everything to decorate your home at the Christmas Workshop Amazon page.
description: Product Description Previous page Colourful Glow Choose from a calming warm white light colour, or a spectacular multicolour set of lights. Energy Efficiency The lights utilise LED technology, helping to save power and your energy bills each night. Perfect for Trees The structure of the fairy string lights makes them perfect for wrapping around & lighting up trees. Extensive Coverage The lights all feature 3 metre lead wires and long coverage, making them ideal for many scenarios.
